new_value: Enhanced lichen/apps/gateway/Kconfig with LICHEN_GATEWAY_WIFI_SSID/PSK + expanded PREFIX_DELEGATION (selects WIFI/NET_L2_WIFI_MGMT/NET_IPV6_ND6, implies DHCPv6_CLIENT, detailed help ref to spec/appendix-border-router.md + AGENTS.md). Updated heltec gateway board .conf with SSID/PSK, NET_* tuning, heap=98304 for 6LBR/WiFi. Matches task exactly.
